iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. Gabbard testimony controversy: accused of altering Senate intel to match war justification. IC assessment: enrichment 'obliterated' 2025. No nuclear program rebuilding. Nuclear doctrine unchanged. Still strongest de-escalation signal. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — Iran conventional IMMINENT. South Pars retaliation cycle continues. Reuters: US weighs military reinforcements for 'possible new phase.' Iran asks Germany to clarify Ramstein airbase role. Al Jazeera confirms: Qatar expelled Iranian military attaches, Saudi FM warned 'nonpolitical options on table.' Three senior assassinations (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib) in 2 days. Mojtaba Khamenei vows retaliation. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all shipping through Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Trump-Netanyahu split on South Pars: 'I told him don't do that'
latest_news.text: Trump confirms he neither agreed with nor approved Israel's South Pars strike. 'We get along great. It's coordinated, but on occasion he'll do something.' Daylight between the two leaders visible for first time.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — IMMINENT. Ground invasion past Litani ongoing. 1,000+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Bridges destroyed. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace. 3 NATO Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Coupling from Iran conventional keeps elevated. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 8% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. No new developments. Border tension contained. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (up). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. Arms supplies to Iran ongoing. Oil price boost to Russian revenue. No direct intervention. Caspian Sea strikes in Russia's maritime backyard. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. US intel: no 2027 Taiwan invasion planned. Status quo. China mediating diplomatically. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — DETERRENT. Kim tank drills (standard). No active threat signals. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 38% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — CRITICAL. Attacks dropped 85% (50+/day → 7-10/day). Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil price boost to Russian revenue reduces economic pressure. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 38% (stable). Day 20 Hour 07 auto — CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP 3-day truce. No fighting. Post-Eid resumption expected Mar 23. Updated 2026-03-20T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 06. Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Hormuz — first positive Hormuz signal from Israel. Trump halts Israeli energy strikes. Oil dropped from $119 to $108 on Hormuz reopening news. BUT: Iran MPs propose Hormuz tolls legislation, blockade continues. War rhetoric persists. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85% (50+/day → 7-10/day) but peace talks paused. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23.

latest_news.headline: US weighs military reinforcements as Iran war enters possible new phase
latest_news.text: Reuters exclusive: US Pentagon weighing additional military reinforcements for Middle East as Iran war enters 'possible new phase.' Ground invasion component under discussion.

latest_news.headline: Iran asks Germany to clarify role of Ramstein airbase in war
latest_news.text: Iran's ambassador to Germany demands clarification on Ramstein airbase's role in the war. Diplomatic escalation toward NATO territory.

latest_news.headline: UAE dismantles 'terrorist network' funded by Iran and Hezbollah
latest_news.text: UAE security services dismantle alleged terrorist network funded by Iran and Hezbollah — parallel to Kuwait's terror cell arrest.

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls/taxes on all Strait of Hormuz shipping
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on all ships passing through Strait of Hormuz — new economic blockade mechanism.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu says Israel will help US reopen Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Netanyahu commits Israel to reopening Hormuz. Brent drops from $119 to $108.65. War 'may end sooner than people think.'

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 07:00 UTC) — Day 20 of Iran war. US weighs reinforcements (Reuters). Iran questions Ramstein role — NATO diplomatic escalation. Three senior assassinations in 2 days. South Pars retaliation cycle continues. Qatar expelled Iranian attaches; Saudi warned 'nonpolitical options.' Netanyahu commits to Hormuz reopening, oil down from $119→$108. Iran MPs push Hormuz tolls legislation. Gabbard testimony controversy. Russia-Ukraine: attacks dropped 85%, peace talks paused. Pakistan-Afghanistan: Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23. DPRK: quiet. China: quiet.
